name: TestCreateTesterAction
title: TestCreateTesterAction
syntax: long TestCreateTesterAction(char[] actionText, char[] heading, char[] callback);
description: Creates a tester action. The condition is checked every time when the given trigger occurs. The check of the condition must be implemented in the given CAPL callback. The triggers have to be added with the TestAddTriggerTesterAction function.To execute the command call TestValidateTesterAction with the handle of the tester action.

parameters.name: actionText
parameters.description: Tester instruction of the popup window.
